message:
fix(tools): correct truncate_head test expectation; reformat tui match arms

tools.rs: Fix the `truncate_head` test assertion — `truncate_head` with
max_lines=3 on a 5-line input should preserve the trailing newline after
line 3 (the function splits on newline boundaries, not line counts), so
the expected output changes from "line1\nline2\nline3" to
"line1\nline2\nline3\n".

tui.rs: Reformat the `strip_markup` character match arm from a single
dense line to one-character-per-line vertical layout for readability.
No behavioral change — purely rustfmt-driven reformatting of the
`matches!` macro invocation that lists allowed tag-interior characters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
